narrative: Diplomacy hopes for a US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz drive a sharp crude sell-off and lift risk sentiment — gold higher +0.00%; equities +0.37%; DXY +0.00%; VIX 16.6. USD/JPY consolidates at 158.91 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry remains the primary anchor despite the holiday-thinned USD retreat. EUR/USD firms to 1.1647, though a +2.2pt Vol Risk Premium suggests the options market is still paying a notable premium for downside protection. Watch the RBNZ rate decision at 02:00 UTC on May 27.
